posts.author: Shivprasad (Shivprasad)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Matias.Monday ,

Current spring boot app is very basic “hello world” app.
on Deployment process it is mentioned that If you’re not using NodeJS " Use our App Storage API endpoints

How do we use storage API from spring boot app. Do we have any sample for that? from where i can get this storage API endpoint?

Any help would be highly appreciated

Thanks
Shiv

posts.author: Shamika (Shamika Kumarasinghe)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi I am new to the Monday Apps Just want to know as per the current sdk support and developer experience what would you recommend to develop apps based on Java or Node. I am in a situation of choosing a one.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @Shamika,

Our SDK is JS based, so I would take that into account!
